text_block_list.text:
One day, per Gold City's request, we train right
up until sunset.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew...
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm? What was that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yukino? What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ah, um... W-well...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, calm down.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What are all those plastic bottles on the ground?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Um, ah, it's refresh'n water from Morioka!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I was plannin' on bring'n 'em to you, but then...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When I saw you look'n so beautiful in the sunset...
I was mesmerized.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Beautiful, huh? It always comes down to that.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Pard'n me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. Was just thinking how I couldn't
change the words people use to describe me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just once, I wanted them to call me a "strong"
runner.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, not that I care about that anymore. Now, I
run because I want to.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You don't understand, do you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's true that you're super beautiful on the
outside... so beautiful it hurts, even. But that's not
all I mean!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Everythin's packed into that word. When we say "beautiful," we mean "strong," and "awesome," and all of that stuff!
You, right now, are incredibly beautiful.
You, right now, are incredibly beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
If you really think all we're seein' is your looks,
that just... it makes me so sad.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: 'Cause everythin' about you's beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You... really think so?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then... back then...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You're so pretty when you run! City, you're
the best!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe a model can run like that! You're so
cool, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you saying...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Some of those people... were seeing me as a runner?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: ...City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: AHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So... what, it was all in my head? God, I'm such an
idiot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Like, seriously. I'm a board-certified idiot... Haha!
HAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: ...You're beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You've always been beautiful, but... you look ev'n
more beautiful now.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I like it. You're the best you've ev'r been!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I get that. Because you know what? Right now, I
like myself too!
